playgroup.title: Montessori Playgroup
playgroup.subtitle: Infant Care & Pre-Toddler
playgroup.description: Our Playgroup programme nurtures infants and toddlers through sensory-rich Montessori activities, building cognitive, language, motor, and social-emotional foundations.

junior.title: Montessori Junior
junior.subtitle: Nursery & Preparatory
junior.description: Our Junior programme prepares children for primary school through critical thinking, independence, and a comprehensive Montessori curriculum integrated with STEAM.
